common.tagline: Your trusted international business partner, connecting Korea with global markets through strategic partnerships and expert consultation services

hero.title: Global Group Korea
hero.subtitle: International Commodity Trading & Investment Partner
hero.description: Since 1987, Global Group Korea (GGK) has been a trusted leader in international commodity trading — specializing in crude oil, copper, quartz, and gold across 25+ countries in Africa, the Middle East, and beyond.
hero.description2: With 37 years of expertise in global resource trading, GGK delivers strategic sourcing, trade finance, and end-to-end supply chain solutions for partners worldwide.

about.title: Expanding Horizons Through Strategic Global Presence
about.description: Global Group Korea (GGK) operates from our headquarters in Seoul, Korea, serving as the central hub for finance, general affairs, administration, and international business development. Our comprehensive approach to global expansion ensures seamless operations across multiple continents.
about.description2: Established through Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) frameworks, our international network spans five strategic locations: Cape Town in South Africa, Accra in Ghana, Dubai in the UAE, Dhaka in Bangladesh, and Montreal in Canada. Each office is strategically positioned to capitalize on regional opportunities while maintaining direct communication with our Seoul headquarters.
about.description3: Our organizational structure combines local market expertise with Korean business excellence, creating a unique advantage in cross-border transactions and partnerships. Through our network of affiliated companies and co-working partnerships, we deliver comprehensive solutions tailored to each market's specific requirements.

leadership.title: Executive Leadership Team
leadership.subtitle: Our leadership combines decades of international business experience with deep market knowledge across multiple industries and regions.
leadership.advisorySubtitle: Our advisory team provides specialized expertise across technical, operational, and strategic domains to ensure project success.
leadership.regionalSubtitle: Our regional directors bring deep local market knowledge and cultural expertise to facilitate successful business operations across diverse markets.

kasseyPaul.name: Dr. Kassey Chandra Sekhar Paul
kasseyPaul.description: Leads all technical and supply operations for GGK's high-purity quartz business. As Founder and Managing Director of Vish Kvartz Intanz Company Limited (VKICL), Tanzania, Dr. Paul brings over 25 years of expertise in mineral resource development, mine operations, and quality certification — serving as GGK's primary technical authority for HPQ supply chain integrity.

byungheunJang.name: Byungheun Jang
byungheunJang.description: Provides strategic counsel on complex international transactions and regulatory compliance across multiple jurisdictions. His expertise encompasses risk assessment, market entry strategies, and partnership structuring.

seongtaekHong.name: Dr. Seongtaek Hong
seongtaekHong.description: Leads technical due diligence and project feasibility assessments. His research background ensures thorough evaluation of technical specifications, quality standards, and implementation methodologies for complex projects.

kateLee.name: Kate Lee
kateLee.description: Develops and executes international marketing strategies, managing brand positioning and market penetration across multiple regions. Coordinates cross-cultural marketing campaigns and partnership development initiatives.

ramiReddy.name: Dr. Pallapolu Venkata Rami Reddy
ramiReddy.description: The Overseas Director leads our international commodity trading operations, specializing in gold, copper, and crude oil. This position oversees strategic sourcing and negotiations with global suppliers, conducts comprehensive market analysis and risk management, and develops key partnerships across international markets.

ansahJoseph.name: Ansah Joseph
ansahJoseph.description: Manages West African operations with particular expertise in mining, agriculture, and infrastructure sectors. Provides critical insights into regulatory frameworks and business practices across the region.

alexKakoma.name: Alex Chinyama Kakoma
alexKakoma.description: Overseas Southern Africa regional operations based out of the Cape Town office. Leads business development and partnership building across Southern African markets, leveraging deep local market expertise to drive strategic expansion.

ceo.title: Message from the Chairman
ceo.message2: Since our founding in 1987, we have built a global network spanning Africa, the Middle East, and Asia, pioneering new horizons in international business over 37 years. We have secured stable supply chains for key resources including crude oil, copper, quartz, and gold, working with regional experts to deliver exceptional value to our clients.
ceo.message3: Notably, our strategic partnership with VISH KVARTZ INTANZ in Tanzania has secured exclusive worldwide distribution rights for high-purity quartz, marking a significant milestone in shaping the future of the semiconductor and solar industries. Global Group Korea will continue to prioritize our clients' success, growing together through trust and innovation.

overview.title: Business Overview
overview.text1: Global Group Korea provides stable crude oil supply through partnerships with major production sites in the Middle East, Russia, and the Americas. We specialize in optimizing supply chains tailored to each client's needs.
overview.text2: Through long-term contracts with global refineries, we achieve competitive pricing and guarantee stable supply. With 37 years of industry expertise, we manage all stages from risk management to logistics optimization.

feature1.title: Global Sourcing
feature1.text: Direct access to major production sites in the Middle East, Russia, and the Americas, offering optimal procurement conditions for each region.

feature2.title: Flexible Contracts
feature2.text: Provides various contract options from spot trading to long-term contracts, building optimal strategies according to client needs.

feature3.title: Quality Assurance
feature3.text: Supplies various crude oil grades including light sweet crude and heavy sour crude, with thorough quality management.

feature4.title: Logistics Optimization
feature4.text: Optimizes the entire transportation route from production site to refinery, achieving cost efficiency through partnerships with major shipping companies.

process1.text: Understand requirements and propose optimal sourcing strategies

process2.title: Contract Negotiation
process2.text: Price negotiation and contract drafting with production sites

process3.title: Logistics Arrangement
process3.text: Shipping booking and insurance, transportation route optimization

process4.title: Delivery & Settlement
process4.text: On-time delivery and transparent settlement processing

overview.title: Business Overview
overview.text1: Global Group Korea maintains a sourcing network across Africa's key copper-producing regions, providing a stable supply of high-quality copper materials for a range of industries.
overview.text2: The importance of copper is growing in the transition to a low-carbon economy, making it essential for the electric vehicle, renewable energy, and electronics industries. We build stable supply chains based on demand from these growth sectors.

feature1.title: Premium Quality
feature1.text: We primarily supply LME-registered Grade A copper cathode (99.99% purity or higher) and also handle various processed products as needed.

feature2.title: Stable Supply
feature2.text: Secure stable sourcing through long-term partnerships with mines across Africa's copper-producing regions.

feature3.title: Price Competitiveness
feature3.text: Provide competitive pricing through large-volume trading based on LME standard prices.

feature4.title: Custom Solutions
feature4.text: Flexibly respond to various forms and specifications from copper cathode to wire and tubes.

process1.title: Requirement Confirmation
process1.text: Confirm specifications, quantity, and delivery schedule

process2.title: Supply Source Selection
process2.text: Select optimal supply source and negotiate pricing

process3.title: Quality Inspection
process3.text: Quality certification before shipment and insurance arrangement

process4.title: Delivery Completion
process4.text: International logistics and customs clearance support

overview.title: Business Overview
overview.text1: Global Group Korea has signed a Strategic Partnership Agreement (SPA) with VISH KVARTZ INTANZ of Tanzania, securing exclusive worldwide distribution rights for high-purity quartz. This formally executed agreement establishes GGK as the sole global supplier of Tanzanian premium quartz, essential for the semiconductor and solar industries.
overview.text2: VISH KVARTZ INTANZ operates 18 quartz mines across two regions and three locations in Tanzania, with a confirmed reserve base of 18 million metric tons. Achieving exceptional silica (SiO₂) purity ranging from +99.9% to +99.99% with electrical conductivity below 4 μS/cm, our quartz meets the most stringent demands of the global semiconductor, photovoltaic, and fibre optic industries.

feature1.title: Exclusive Distribution
feature1.text: Sole company with worldwide distribution rights for VISH KVARTZ INTANZ Tanzanian quartz.

feature2.title: Ultra-High Purity
feature2.text: Supplies high-purity quartz of 99.99% or higher, meeting semiconductor and solar industry standards.

feature3.title: Stable Supply
feature3.text: Guarantees long-term supply stability based on a confirmed reserve base of 18 million metric tons across 18 mines, with each site capable of delivering 5,000 to 10,000 tons per month.

feature4.title: Consistent Quality
feature4.text: Quartz from a single mine enables consistent quality management, minimizing production deviation.

feature5.title: Semiconductor Grade
feature5.text: Catering to critical applications including semiconductor silicon wafer production, photovoltaic (PV) cell manufacturing, and fibre optic systems.

feature6.title: Massive Reserves
feature6.text: With 18 million metric tons of confirmed reserves across 18 mines, we ensure decades of uninterrupted supply for your long-term projects.

gallery.title: Tanzania Quartz Operations
gallery.subtitle: On-site photos and videos from VISH KVARTZ INTANZ mining operations
gallery.intro: Founded in 2019 by Dr. Chandra Sekhar Paul Kassey, VISH KVARTZ INTANZ specializes in high-purity quartz production, serving key markets including China, Japan, Taiwan, and India for semiconductor wafer production, photovoltaic cell manufacturing, and fibre optic systems.

overview.title: Business Overview
overview.text1: Global Group Korea provides safe and transparent gold trading services centered on LBMA (London Bullion Market Association) certified gold bars. We supply gold to meet both investment and industrial demands.
overview.text2: We handle various products including investment gold bars, jewelry raw materials, and industrial gold, building stable supply chains based on long-term partnerships with refineries in Switzerland and Hong Kong.

feature1.title: LBMA Certification
feature1.text: All gold bars are LBMA certified, guaranteeing reliable quality and transparent origin.

feature2.title: Diverse Products
feature2.text: Supplies various specifications from 1oz gold coins to 1kg bars, meeting both investment and industrial needs.

feature3.title: Real-time Pricing
feature3.text: Provides competitive trading conditions based on international gold prices with 24-hour real-time price monitoring.

feature4.title: Secure Logistics
feature4.text: Safe delivery through partnerships with specialized precious metals logistics companies, with full insurance coverage.

overview.title: Business Overview
overview.text1: Global Group Korea supplies crude oil and refined petroleum products — EN590 10ppm diesel and Jet A-1 aviation fuel — through verified refining and supply channels across the Middle East, Africa, and the Americas. We are a principal-focused trading company, not a broker chain.
overview.text2: Every transaction is built on KYC-cleared counterparties and internationally standard payment structures — transferable L/C, SBLC, or escrow. We do not request advance payments for logistics, customs, or documentation. This standard procedure protects genuine partners and filters out fraudulent approaches.

feature1.title: Verified Supply Chains
feature1.text: Sourcing through verified refining and supply channels, with certificate of origin and COQ for every cargo. Sanctioned-origin cargoes are not handled.

feature2.title: Refined & Crude Range
feature2.text: EN590 10ppm ULSD to EN 590, Jet A-1 to DEF STAN 91-091 / ASTM D1655, and crude oil across light/heavy, sweet/sour grades.

feature3.title: Bank-Instrument Settlement
feature3.text: Transferable L/C, SBLC and escrow only. No advance payments for customs, logistics, or documentation at any stage.

feature4.title: Independent Quality Control
feature4.text: Cargoes inspected by an international agency such as SGS, with quality confirmed by Certificate of Quality at loading.

process1.title: KYC & Due Diligence
process1.text: Mutual verification of buyer and seller identity and standing as a prerequisite

process3.title: Contract & Instrument
process3.text: Binding SPA signed; transferable L/C, SBLC or escrow established

process4.title: Inspection & Delivery
process4.text: SGS/COQ inspection, then shipment and delivery on agreed Incoterms

hero.title: News & Announcements
hero.subtitle: Latest updates from Global Group Korea

article1.title: GGK Signs Strategic Partnership for Tanzanian Quartz Production Hub
article1.excerpt: Global Group Korea and VISH KVARTZ INTANZ formalize exclusive worldwide distribution agreement for high-purity quartz.
article1.body: Global Group Korea has officially signed a Strategic Partnership Agreement (SPA) with VISH KVARTZ INTANZ, establishing exclusive worldwide distribution rights for premium quartz from the Morogoro region in Tanzania. The partnership covers 18 quartz mines with confirmed reserves of 18 million metric tons, producing quartz with SiO₂ purity ranging from +99.9% to +99.99%. This milestone positions GGK as the sole global supplier of Tanzanian high-purity quartz, essential for semiconductor, solar, and fibre optic industries.

article2.title: 2026 Global Commodity Market Outlook: Key Trends to Watch
article2.excerpt: Our analysts examine the major forces shaping commodity prices in 2026.
article2.body: As we move further into 2026, several key factors are reshaping global commodity markets. The ongoing energy transition continues to drive copper demand, with electric vehicle production and renewable energy infrastructure requiring unprecedented volumes. Gold maintains its role as a safe-haven asset amid geopolitical uncertainties, while crude oil markets are adjusting to shifting OPEC+ policies. The semiconductor industry's growth is fueling demand for high-purity quartz, creating new opportunities in mineral supply chains.

article3.title: GGK Expands South Asia Operations with Dhaka Office Upgrade
article3.excerpt: Global Group Korea strengthens its Bangladesh presence with expanded operations.
article3.body: Global Group Korea is investing in the expansion of its Dhaka office to better serve the growing South Asian market. The upgraded facility will feature enhanced trading operations, a larger team of regional specialists, and improved logistics coordination capabilities. This expansion reflects GGK's commitment to strengthening its presence across the region, supporting trade partnerships, and capitalizing on Bangladesh's rapidly growing economy.

article4.title: African Mineral Market Growth: Opportunities and Outlook
article4.excerpt: Exploring the surge in African mineral exploration and its implications for global trade.
article4.body: Africa's mineral sector is experiencing remarkable growth, driven by global demand for critical minerals and increasing investment in mining infrastructure. Countries like Tanzania, Ghana, and South Africa are emerging as key players in the supply of minerals essential for the green energy transition. Global Group Korea, with its extensive African network spanning Cape Town, Accra, and Morogoro, is uniquely positioned to connect these resources with global markets, particularly in high-purity quartz, copper, and gold.

cta.text: Tell us what you source and where you operate. Our trading desk will respond with a tailored supply proposal.

hero.title: A trusted partner, connecting Korea with global markets
hero.lede: Since 1987, Global Group Korea has delivered strategic sourcing, trade finance, and end-to-end supply-chain solutions across crude oil, copper, quartz, and gold — building 37 years of heritage in international resource trading.

about.title: Hub of the World
about.p1: Global Group Korea (GGK) is an international commodity trading and investment partner specializing in crude oil, copper, quartz, and gold across 25+ countries in Africa, the Middle East, and beyond.
about.p2: From our Seoul headquarters and six regional offices, we combine deep local knowledge with rigorous risk management to give partners a single, accountable counterparty from sourcing through settlement.

leadership.title: Executive leadership team
leadership.subtitle: Decades of international business experience with deep market knowledge across industries and regions.

michaelLee.title: Chairman
michaelLee.bio: Strategic vision and corporate governance leadership with extensive experience in international market development and cross-cultural business operations.

davidHan.title: CEO / Managing Director
davidHan.bio: Operational excellence and business development expertise, driving growth initiatives across our global network of partnerships and investments.

huhSeongphil.title: Vice Chairman
huhSeongphil.bio: Academic and industry leadership combining research excellence with practical business applications in emerging markets and technology sectors.

kasseyPaul.title: Director of Technical Operations
kasseyPaul.bio: Leads all technical and supply operations for GGK's high-purity quartz business. Founder and MD of VKICL, Tanzania, with over 25 years in mineral resource development, mine operations, and quality certification.

byungheunJang.title: Special Advisor
byungheunJang.bio: Provides strategic counsel on complex international transactions and regulatory compliance across multiple jurisdictions — risk assessment, market entry, and partnership structuring.

seongtaekHong.title: Technical Director
seongtaekHong.bio: Leads technical due diligence and project feasibility assessments, ensuring thorough evaluation of specifications, quality standards, and implementation methodologies.

kateLee.title: Overseas Marketing Director
kateLee.bio: Develops and executes international marketing strategies, managing brand positioning and cross-cultural campaigns across multiple regions.

ramyReddy.title: Overseas Director (Trading Dept.)
ramyReddy.bio: Leads international commodity trading in gold, copper, and crude oil — strategic sourcing, supplier negotiation, market analysis, and risk management across global markets.

ansahJoseph.title: Director / Ghana
ansahJoseph.bio: Manages West African operations with expertise in mining, agriculture, and infrastructure, providing insight into regional regulatory frameworks and business practices.

alexKakoma.title: Regional Representative — Southern Africa
alexKakoma.bio: Oversees Southern Africa operations from the Cape Town office, leading business development and partnership building across the region.

hero.title: News & market insights
hero.lede: Company milestones and analyst perspectives on the forces shaping global commodity markets.

feature.title: GGK Signs Strategic Partnership for Tanzanian Quartz Production Hub
feature.excerpt: Global Group Korea and VISH KVARTZ INTANZ formalize an exclusive worldwide distribution agreement for high-purity quartz from Morogoro, Tanzania — 18 mines and 18M-tonne reserves, exported via Dar es Salaam Port.

a1.title: 2026 Global Commodity Market Outlook: Key Trends to Watch
a1.excerpt: Our analysts examine the major forces shaping commodity prices in 2026, from the energy transition to semiconductor demand growth.

a2.title: GGK Expands South Asia Operations with Dhaka Office Upgrade
a2.excerpt: Global Group Korea strengthens its Bangladesh presence with expanded facilities and a larger team to support growing regional trade.
